---
title: "Deploy & Operations"
execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

## Deploy & Operations

## Routine Deploy

On the VM:

```bash
cd /home/yeroslaviz/BCFMS-project-management
git pull origin main
./scripts/deploy.sh
```

The deploy script syncs `ms-app/` to `/srv/shiny-server/ms-app/`, excludes `ms_projects.db` and `.Renviron`, fixes ownership, restarts Shiny, and runs HTTPS/LDAP smoke tests unless `SKIP_SMOKE_TEST=1`.

## Pre-Deploy Backups

```bash
sudo rsync -av /srv/shiny-server/ms-app/ /srv/shiny-server/ms-app.backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M)/
sudo cp /srv/shiny-server/ms-app/ms_projects.db /srv/shiny-server/ms-app/ms_projects.db.bak.$(date +%F-%H%M%S)
sudo cp /etc/apache2/sites-enabled/ms-vm-shiny-443.conf /etc/apache2/sites-enabled/ms-vm-shiny-443.conf.backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M)
```

## Restart Services

```bash
sudo systemctl restart shiny-server
sudo systemctl restart apache2
```

## Smoke Tests

```bash
curl -Ik https://mscf-vm.biochem.mpg.de/
curl -Ik -u USER https://mscf-vm.biochem.mpg.de/ms-app/
curl -I http://127.0.0.1:3838/ms-app/
```

Optional non-interactive LDAP smoke test:

```bash
LDAP_TEST_USER="yeroslaviz-test" LDAP_TEST_PASSWORD="YOUR_PASSWORD" ./scripts/deploy.sh
```

Skip smoke tests only when needed:

```bash
SKIP_SMOKE_TEST=1 ./scripts/deploy.sh
```

Override the public URL:

```bash
PUBLIC_BASE_URL="https://mscf-vm.biochem.mpg.de" ./scripts/deploy.sh
```

## Database Behavior

Deploy is code-only. It does not rebuild or overwrite `ms_projects.db`.

To initialize a new database:

```bash
cd /srv/shiny-server/ms-app
sudo -u shiny Rscript setup_database.R
```

To apply schema/seed checks without deleting existing data:

```bash
cd /srv/shiny-server/ms-app
sudo -u shiny MS_RESET_DB=0 Rscript setup_database.R
```

## Rollback

```bash
sudo systemctl stop shiny-server
sudo rsync -av --delete /srv/shiny-server/ms-app.backup_YYYYMMDD_HHMM/ /srv/shiny-server/ms-app/
sudo cp /srv/shiny-server/ms-app/ms_projects.db.bak.<timestamp> /srv/shiny-server/ms-app/ms_projects.db
sudo chown -R shiny:shiny /srv/shiny-server/ms-app
sudo systemctl start shiny-server
sudo systemctl restart apache2
```

## Logs

```bash
sudo tail -n 120 /var/log/shiny-server/ms-app-shiny-*.log
sudo tail -n 120 /var/log/apache2/ms-app-ssl-access.log
sudo tail -n 120 /var/log/apache2/ms-app-ssl-error.log
```
